title: Financial slips and summaries - Canada.ca
content:
## Financial slips and summaries
Filers must use their information returns program account .
Mandatory Internet filing applies to filers of information returns who submit more than 5 information slips. If you file more than 5 information slips , there are special rules you have to follow when filing information returns electronically .
For the latest information about the penalty for not filing information returns over the Internet, go to What happens if you file using the wrong method . You can also subscribe to our email distribution list about the electronic filing of information returns at Canada Revenue Agency electronic mailing lists .
